reviews: Honest mechanics are hard to find. These guys diagnosed the issue in 20 minutes and didn't try to upsell me.
The diagnostic team found a problem two other shops missed. Saved me thousands in potential damage.
No-nonsense auto shop. Fair prices, quality work, and they actually explain what they're doing.
description: Allstar Auto provides expert auto repair and maintenance with transparency and integrity. Our certified technicians use state-of-the-art diagnostics to keep your vehicle running at its best.
